title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-Francois Bouchard discuss techniques for converting notes, documents, videos, and code repositories into machine-readable memory representations for AI agents. The approach enables agents to leverage diverse knowledge sources.
